title: Bridge cleanup report and TerraYield long report verification
note: Short task to verify watchdog/runner state, API state, and long composite report path. Wait 4 minutes before writing devam et.
command: Write-Output 'TASK: Bridge cleanup report + TerraYield long report verification'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 92%'; Write-Output 'ESTIMATED_WAIT: 3-4 dakika'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; Write-Output '--- TerraYield reports newest ---'; Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 8 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output '--- API quick status ---'; foreach ($ep in @('/health','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/combined')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('OK ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length) } catch { Write-Output ('FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output '--- Bridge process check ---'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name = 'powershell.exe' OR name = 'pwsh.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -and ($_.CommandLine -like '*AAYS_USERMODE_WATCHDOG.ps1*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*AAYS_CHATGPT_RUNNER_V4.ps1*') } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output '--- Bridge git status short ---'; git -C 'C:\Users\cagda\Documents\chat_gpt_clone_1' status --short; Write-Output '--- Watchdog heartbeat local if exists ---'; $hb='C:\Users\cagda\Documents\chat_gpt_clone_1\ai-heartbeat\user-mode-watchdog.md'; if (Test-Path $hb) { Get-Content $hb -Raw } else { Write-Output 'NO_WATCHDOG_HEARTBEAT' }; Write-Output '--- Runner heartbeat local if exists ---'; $rh='C:\Users\cagda\Documents\chat_gpt_clone_1\ai-heartbeat\runner-v4.md'; if (Test-Path $rh) { Get-Content $rh -Raw } else { Write-Output 'NO_RUNNER_HEARTBEAT' }; Write-Output 'BRIDGE_CLEANUP_REPORT_DONE'
